meta.note: Synthetic label, not an identifier. Fully de-identified: no PII/PHI.
meta.purpose: Input for an automated dataset + literature discovery harness. Research/hypothesis-generation only; not medical advice.
meta.primary_focus: severe / difficult-to-treat rheumatoid arthritis; goal = data-driven paths to remission

conditions.neurological_bulbar_workup: active (context only, not the search target)

data_to_confirm: RF and anti-CCP/ACPA status and titers
full csDMARD/tsDMARD/biologic sequence w/ doses, durations, response, AEs, discontinuation reasons
anti-drug antibody / drug-level results on prior biologic 'failures'
extra-articular manifestations (nodules, ILD, vasculitis, secondary Sjogren)
ANA/ENA overlap panel; HLA if available
IBD phenotype and its current therapy (cross-indication relevance)
fibromyalgia / central sensitization assessment; adherence history

candidate_data_resources.name: NCBI GEO
candidate_data_resources.use: RA synovial & whole-blood transcriptomes; DE + response signatures

candidate_data_resources.name: R4RA trial data
candidate_data_resources.use: biopsy-stratified rituximab vs tocilizumab response; ML response + multidrug-resistance models

candidate_data_resources.name: ClinicalTrials.gov
candidate_data_resources.use: active refractory/D2T RA and autoimmune cell-therapy trials

seed_directions.hypothesis: Formally classify as EULAR difficult-to-treat RA; verify diagnosis; separate inflammatory vs non-inflammatory (fibromyalgia/central sensitization) drivers before escalating.
Structured mechanism-of-action switching across IL-6R / JAK / T-cell co-stim / B-cell classes; check anti-drug antibodies + drug levels to separate PK failure from mechanistic non-response.

Endotype the disease (synovial B-cell-rich vs poor; stromal/fibroblast multidrug-resistant signature per R4RA) and match drug class to endotype; infer from blood transcriptomics where tissue unavailable.
Exploit RA+IBD+autoimmune overlap: rank cross-indicated agents and shared upstream druggable nodes (B-cell, IL-6, JAK-STAT) via network/pathway enrichment.

Track CD19 CAR-T (e.g., KYV-101 COMPARE trial in D2T RA), dual CD19/BCMA, and CAR-Treg approaches producing B-cell reset / drug-free remission in refractory autoimmune disease; trial-only, horizon option.

disclaimer: Research and hypothesis-generation aid only. Not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. All outputs require review and decision by the licensed care team.
